replies.msg:
Dude i feel like i have no goal at all in my life
Every time i go to gym i ponder about the question --- Whats the point of doing gym today?To get strong?And whats the fucking point to be stronger?
And it makes me less and less motivated.Eventually i will just set the habit aside and masturbate at home.
By the way,i feel my life has no meaning at all
i dont have a dream and i dont have a life as well
I dont understand why people are able to enjoy every moment of their life
I am stuck at this dead loop who can help me
Same for me dude
I start hitting the gym because I see what happened in 612, 721 and basically every news about the popo since June. fyr

some time things might seem useless, think about the people joined protest for years and years, think about people tried to occupy central. Without all these, things won't happen today.

Effort will eventually add up, you just never know when or how. Like Steve Jobs said "Dots will connect"

I am sure a healthy and strong body will definitely connect to something meaningful one day
